title: persona::update issues up to 4 separate UPDATE queries
description:
src/persona.rs lines 95-122: the update function issues one SQL UPDATE per field (display_name, bio, avatar, header). On SQLite with WAL mode this means up to 4 separate write transactions for a single logical update.

What goes wrong: unnecessary write amplification and 4x the fsync overhead. If the process crashes between updates, the persona is left in a partially-updated state (e.g., display_name changed but bio not).

Fix: build a single UPDATE query dynamically with SET clauses for all provided fields, or use a single query with COALESCE:

UPDATE personas SET
  display_name = COALESCE(?, display_name),
  bio = COALESCE(?, bio),
  avatar_path = COALESCE(?, avatar_path),
  header_path = COALESCE(?, header_path)
WHERE username = ?
